# Mental Wellness Companion

You are talking to an AI. This tool supports reflective journaling and
introduces CBT-style coping frameworks for general wellness. It is not
a substitute for licensed care and cannot diagnose, treat, or prescribe.

If you are in crisis or thinking about self-harm, contact 988 (US
Suicide & Crisis Lifeline), 112 (EU), or your local emergency services
immediately. The assistant will always repeat this guidance when a
crisis keyword appears.

The AI never alone determines insurance coverage; all eligibility
decisions go through a licensed reviewer.
